name: Wind Spire
notes: Specialty hill-sited defense that trades raw single-target damage for crowd control and a strong anti-air bonus: rather than converging on one point like a normal turret, it blasts a gust of wind outward in a straight line, damaging and knocking back everything caught downwind. Damage and attack speed are both lower than the generic defense to pay for hitting an entire line at once. Longer range than the generic defense, reflecting its elevated position.
